value.found_quote:
### Configure manually

1. Open `~/.codex/config.toml` in your editor.
2. Add the following:

```toml
[mcp_servers.linear]
url = "https://mcp.linear.app/mcp"
```
value.rationale: The page describes a "Configure manually" method that involves editing the Codex config.toml file (~/.codex/config.toml) to set up the Linear MCP server, exactly as the claim states. No lifecycle indication of deprecation or sunset is present.
